Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Place every selectable piece onto a goal tile marked '+' simultaneously. Multiple goals require all to be occupied at once for a WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Pieces are selected by clicking their position. MOVE_RIGHT shifts the currently selected piece right if unblocked. Clicking another position attempts to teleport or select/move the piece there. Walls and obstacles block movement; repeated blocked moves waste steps without effect. Run ends at 0 steps.
